title: Upon A Crooked Maid.
content:
Crooked you are, but that dislikes not me:
    So you be straight where virgins straight should be.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Upon A Crooked Maid."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
